mapper.select: SELECT NVL( (SELECT rem_point FROM ( SELECT rem_point FROM point WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY reg_date DESC, point_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1), 0) FROM DUAL

SELECT point_id AS pointId, member_id AS memberId, order_id AS orderId, change_reason AS changeReason, point_amount AS pointAmount, rem_point AS remPoint, TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS regDate FROM point WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY point_id DESC
SELECT NVL(SUM(point_amount), 0) FROM point WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND point_amount > 0 AND reg_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')
SELECT NVL(ABS(SUM(point_amount)), 0) FROM point WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND point_amount < 0 AND reg_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')
